name: Queen Chrysalis
description:
Queen Chrysalis, or Chrysalis, is one of the three main antagonists (alongside Lord Tirek and Cozy Glow) of My Little Pony: Friendship is Magic. She is the former queen of the Changelings who sought to feed her subjects' hunger for love and expand her rule across Equestria. She is also the arch-nemesis of Twilight Sparkle and Starlight Glimmer. 

_Feel Free to leave a review so I can make improvements please and thank you have fun_
